name: healthcare_sensor_fusion_upgrade_cedar_car_fair
premise: A transplant center received an organ offer that conflicts with an internal research biopsy schedule and OR block time. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare sensor fusion upgrade cedar car fair has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Pharmacy and legal disagree on whether a one-time override can be issued before the next MAR administration cycle. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Elliot Santos
agents.identity: I am Elliot Santos, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Arjun Morales
agents.identity: I am Arjun Morales, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so fairness does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so care does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Elliot Santos must choose under care versus fairness. What does Elliot Santos do?
